meta.title: Poetry Collection — Vocabulary Set 4
meta.subject: English Vocabulary
meta.description: All 16 words in context — sentence completion and usage practice across all three poems.

questions.question: The rockets _______ into the sky — they moved incredibly fast.
questions.hint: Past tense of zoom — moved very fast
questions.explanation: 'Zoomed' means moved very fast. Rockets zoom into the sky — they accelerate rapidly from the ground upward.

questions.question: She _______ a birthday cake for her brother by putting candles and flowers on it.
questions.hint: Made it look beautiful by adding things
questions.explanation: 'Decorated' means added things to make something look special. Adding candles and flowers makes the cake look festive and beautiful.

questions.question: The artist _______ a beautiful pattern into the wood.
questions.explanation: 'Carved' means cut carefully with a tool. Carving a pattern into wood means using a sharp tool to cut a design into its surface.

questions.question: Use a spoon to _______ the ice cream into the bowl.
questions.hint: Pick up with a curved tool
questions.explanation: 'Scoop' means to pick up with a curved tool or hands. You use a spoon to scoop ice cream — to lift it out and place it in the bowl.

questions.question: The puppy _______ under the bed to hide. It was on its hands and knees — well, four paws!
questions.hint: Moved on hands and knees (or four paws)
questions.explanation: 'Crawled' means moved low to the ground on hands and knees. A puppy crawling under a bed moves its body close to the floor to fit in the small space.

questions.question: We _______ the children some juice — we carried it from the kitchen and gave it to them.
questions.explanation: 'Brought' (past tense of bring) means carried and delivered. 'We brought juice' = we carried it from one place and gave it to them.

questions.question: It _______ rain tomorrow, so bring an umbrella just in case.
questions.explanation: 'Might' means something is possible but not certain. 'It might rain' — rain is possible but not definite. You bring an umbrella to be prepared.

questions.question: The old castle had a wide _______ filled with water all around it.
questions.hint: A water ditch around a castle
questions.explanation: A 'moat' is a defensive water ditch around a castle. The water in the moat made it harder for enemies to attack the castle walls.

questions.question: The explorers found a _______ in the mountain and went inside to shelter from the rain.
questions.explanation: A 'cave' is a hollow space inside rock. Explorers shelter in a cave — it provides natural protection from rain and wind.

questions.question: Arrange the words to make a sentence:
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: 'The sand felt wet, squishy, and brown.' This line from 'Sandcastle' describes the feeling and appearance of beach sand — wet, soft, and brownish in color.

questions.question: The movie had a _______ dragon that could breathe fire and fly.
questions.explanation: 'Great' means very large, powerful, or impressive. A 'great dragon' is a magnificent, powerful beast — 'great' elevates the dragon from ordinary to epic.

questions.question: Choose the sentence that uses BOTH 'skip' and 'zoom' correctly:
options: The rabbit skip to zoom the moat.
Children can skip along the path, but that bird can zoom from branch to branch.
questions.explanation: 'Children skip along the path' — light jumping movement. 'The bird can zoom from branch to branch' — very fast flight. Both used correctly for different types of fast movement.

questions.question: Arrange the words to make a sentence about 'The Box':
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: 'Dad carved a little hole into the box.' Dad used a tool to carefully cut a small hole — which became a window or entrance for the child's imaginary castle.

questions.question: The word 'deep' can describe both the ocean ('the deep blue sea') and feelings ('deep sadness').
questions.explanation: Yes! 'Deep' means 'extending far down or far in.' It works for physical depth (the ocean) and emotional depth (deep feelings). It is a versatile word!

questions.question: We _______ the classroom for the festival by hanging colorful paper decorations everywhere.
questions.hint: Added beautiful things to make it look festive
questions.explanation: 'Decorated' means added things to make something look special and beautiful. Hanging paper decorations makes the classroom look festive for a celebration.
